name: react-render-types-composition
description: Composition patterns for building React components with @renders type annotations from eslint-plugin-react-render-types. Use when: (1) writing React components that need @renders JSDoc annotations, (2) building a design system with enforced component composition (e.g., Menu only accepts MenuItem), (3) deciding which @renders modifier to use (required, optional, many, unchecked), (4) creating wrapper or transparent components, (5) annotating slot props like children/header/footer, (6) using re...
